summary: Iteration 41: Complete frontend testing of Operations Monitor Dashboard (Option C). All features verified successfully. Dashboard displays 4 KPI cards with numeric values (X/Y format), colored icons, progress bars, and percentage indicators. Activity feed shows 12 recent items with asset names, status badges, and locations. Three charts (Répartition État donut, Distribution Statuts bar, Assets par Famille donut) render correctly with SVG. Alerts panel shows 2 battery alerts with colored battery bars. KPI card click opens detail panel with DataTable, close button (X) works correctly. Engins and Tags pages display SaaS Premium headers with gradient icons.

minor.issue: Occasional 500 error on first KPI card click (resolved on retry)

issues: React warning: non-boolean attribute passed to DOM element
React warning: Each child in list should have unique 'key' prop (multiple components)

passed_tests: TEST 1: Login with admin/user@1234 - successful redirect to /tagdashboard/index
TEST 2: Dashboard header - 'Operations Monitor' title visible
TEST 3: Dashboard header - Date/time subtitle (mercredi 8 avril 2026 — 12:30)
TEST 4: Dashboard header - 'Actualiser' refresh button visible
TEST 5: 4 KPI cards visible with data (11/4935 Engins, 12/53 Tags, 1/4935 Engins, 1/53 Tags)
TEST 6: KPI cards have colored icons (blue, red, green, purple)
TEST 7: KPI cards have progress bars
TEST 8: KPI cards have percentage indicators (22%, 1%)
TEST 9: Activity feed 'Dernière Activité' panel visible with '12 récents' badge
TEST 10: Activity feed shows 12 items with asset names (BC57290288E7, etc.)
TEST 11: Activity feed items have status badges (Disponible)
TEST 12: Activity feed items have location text and colored dots
TEST 13: Répartition État donut chart visible with SVG, legend (Actif, Entrée), Total 44, 95%
TEST 14: Distribution Statuts bar chart visible with labels (Disponible 28, Reserve, Livré, Réception, En pannee)
TEST 15: Assets par Famille donut chart visible with legend (BLE, CAB, Pt taille, SENSOR, Autre, QR, GR taille)
TEST 16: Alerts panel 'Assets nécessitant attention' visible with '2 alertes' badge
TEST 17: Alerts table has columns: Asset, Batterie, État, Dernière activité, Localisation
TEST 18: Alerts table shows 2 rows (Pc te 9%, VEN111 0%) with colored battery bars
TEST 19: KPI card 1 click opens detail panel with DataTable
TEST 20: KPI card 2 click opens detail panel with DataTable (Tags libre)
TEST 21: KPI card 3 click opens detail panel with DataTable (Engins non tagués)
TEST 22: KPI card 4 click opens detail panel with DataTable (Tague à maintenir)
TEST 23: Detail panel close button (X) works correctly
TEST 24: Engins page (/view/engin/index) - SaaS Premium header with blue gradient icon
TEST 25: Engins page - Title 'Engins', subtitle 'Gestion et suivi de vos assets'
TEST 26: Engins page - Count badge '4935 assets'
TEST 27: Engins page - 10 Etat badges, 10 Status badges, 10 Battery widgets, 10 Famille chips
TEST 28: Tags page (/tag/index) - SaaS Premium header with purple gradient icon
TEST 29: Tags page - Title 'Liste des tags', subtitle 'Inventaire et suivi de vos tags'
TEST 30: Tags page - Count badge '53 tags'
TEST 31: Tags page - 10 Active badges, 10 Status badges, 10 Famille chips, 6 Address buttons, 4 No address badges
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardListCards.jsx: Operations Monitor dashboard correctly implements all required features - KPI cards, activity feed, charts, alerts panel
DashboardListCards.jsx: ApexCharts (react-apexcharts) used for donut and bar charts with proper configuration
DashboardListCards.jsx: Analytics data fetched via _fetchDashboardDetail for each KPI card to build consolidated view
DashboardListCards.jsx: Skeleton loading states implemented for KPI cards and analytics sections
DashboardDetail.jsx: DataTable component used for detail panel with proper column templates
EnginList.js: SaaS Premium header with blue gradient icon (linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6, #1D4ED8))
TagList.js: SaaS Premium header with purple gradient icon (linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6, #6D28D9))
All pages use data-testid attributes for testing (operations-monitor, om-header, om-kpi-grid, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested Operations Monitor Dashboard (Option C). All features working: 4 KPI cards with X/Y format values, colored icons, progress bars, percentage indicators. Activity feed with 12 items. Three charts (Répartition État donut, Distribution Statuts bar, Assets par Famille donut). Alerts panel with battery status table. KPI card click opens detail panel with DataTable and close button. Engins page uses blue gradient, Tags page uses purple gradient. External API is slow (30-60 seconds) - use long timeouts. Navigation via pushState after login.
